title: Veterans Law Judge Experience Act of 2025
short_title: Veterans Law Judge Experience Act of 2025
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
crs_summary: Veterans Law Judge Experience Act of 2025 This bill requires the Chairman of the Board of Veterans’ Appeals to prioritize individuals with three or more years of legal professional experience in relevant legal areas when recommending individuals to the Department of Veterans Affairs to serve as members of the Board.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
